summary: Regression verification for adding -march=rv64gcv to linux64-riscv64 target. Change is 2-line build config modification with no functional code changes. Full runtime verification deferred to SG2044 target hardware (RVV 1.0, VLEN=128). Code review confirms change follows existing patterns and maintains backward compatibility via runtime dispatch.
